title: Cobblemon: ASAS - Global Animations
description: Server-side Pokemon animations using Pehkui. Works with all Pokemon and Fakemon.
body:
**REQUIRES [PEHKUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)**

**Compatible with other AllShapesAndSizes datapacks, try [Trainer's Influence](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-asas-trainers-influence)!.**

**Compatible with literally any resource pack or datapack.**

**Animates all Pokémon server-side using commands, the datapack must be on the server, not client.**


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JMGCHiVd8d4?si=awZjNMdH5Av602O2" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_(Video Featuring Glideon from [Cobblemon Alatia's Fakemon Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-alatias-fakemon-pack))_

**If I got you interested in the pack, come and vote for the next feature next time I do a poll [here](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1368309517607112765)!**
<details>
<summary>As of R1.0</summary>

## Enter battle animation, synced with the cry.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/jSgm-Bxghqo?si=VXD48JANOw6PhPTQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

<details>
<summary>As of R1.1</summary>

## Deploy animation, synced with the cry.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JVbjNBELGVo?si=oo5gkaEDJ5SUZRCH" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>
<details>
<summary>As of R1.2</summary>

## Sleep animation.
7 different cycles, non-uniform delay. Pokémon audibly snore.
</details>
